creator: neovortex@gmail.com
text: A short term solution could be manually including the Ubiquiti.pm but I'm not sure how difficult that would be to achieve (I did this as a workaround - I simply fetched that file and put it in the right location which made everything happy). That said it might be worth seeing if upstream is going to release a fixed version in the near future at which point it just becomes a simple case of bumping the version to the fixed release..
